a.xlink:title: defines the templated version of the CLEDController class
Internal FastLED header for implementation files.
UCS7604 LED chipset controller implementation for FastLED.
central include file for FastLED, defines the CFastLED class/object
Serial peripheral interface (SPI) definitions per platform.
Contains the bulk of the definitions for the various LED chipsets supported.
Example of a NOP/stub class to show the SPI methods required by a chipset implementation.

Dispatch + implementations for the 5-channel RGB->RGBWW path (issue #2558, Phase 3 of #2545).
Declares classes for managing logical groups of LEDs.
Functions to limit the power used by FastLED.
